reading.title: Reading: A weather forecast
reading.passage: I think it will rain tomorrow, but I'm not completely sure. It's getting cold, so I will close the window now. The meeting probably won't be too long, maybe just one hour.

questions.question: The writer is certain it will rain tomorrow.
questions.explanation: "I think it will rain tomorrow, but I'm not completely sure."

questions.question: What is the writer going to do now?

reading.title: Reading: My plan for the weekend
reading.passage: I am going to visit my hometown this weekend. I already arranged everything and booked the train ticket. My goal this year is to improve my English, so I made a study schedule. I intend to take the IELTS exam in December.

questions.question: The writer hasn't booked a ticket yet.
questions.explanation: "booked the train ticket" cho thấy đã đặt vé.

questions.question: What is the writer's goal this year?
questions.explanation: "My goal this year is to improve my English".
